summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations CMS website. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate). Frontend public pages, navigation, and contact form working correctly. Admin authentication setup verified, but full admin workflow testing incomplete due to browser crash.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, services, products, testimonials
Navigation links work for all pages (Home, About, Services, Products, Portfolio, Blog, Contact)
Services page displays service cards from API (6 cards found)
Products page displays product cards with pricing (4 cards found)
Contact form submission works and integrates with backend API
Admin login page loads with Google OAuth and email/password options
Admin registration form switches modes correctly
User registration and login APIs working
Dashboard stats API returns correct data
Services and products CRUD APIs functional
Contact form submissions saved to database
action_item_for_main_agent: Complete admin dashboard workflow testing - verify admin registration completion, dashboard navigation, and CRUD operations in admin panel. Browser crash prevented full admin testing completion.
